title: Contract 3 — thin waist -> adapter response (per hook fire) (RFC-008 F23)
description: The decision enforce-contract.mjs returns to the adapter. harness_format_hint is an optional harness-specific translation aid; the thin waist stays harness-agnostic.

label.description: classifier's label; 'n/a' for the stop-gate (reads marker state, not commands)

structured_alert_episode.description: episode id if an F3 hard-reject fired, else null

harness_format_hint.description: harness-specific translation aid (e.g. Claude Code {decision, exit_code}); intentionally open.
